faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.q1: What happens during the 3-day free trial?
faq.a1: You get full access to the plan you choose with no restrictions. No card required — the trial activates immediately. You can cancel anytime before the trial ends and you won't be charged.
faq.a2: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes apply immediately and the amount is prorated automatically.
faq.a3: Billing is monthly or annual depending on the cycle you choose. You can cancel anytime and keep access until the end of the paid period.
faq.a4: We accept credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) through our secure payment processor. We don't store your card details.
faq.q5: What's the difference between Plus and Pro?
faq.a5: Plus includes all betting tools: Value Bets, Parlay Builder, Kelly Calculator, and bankroll management. Pro adds everything in Plus plus full Match Intelligence analysis, AI Player Comparison, Monte Carlo Simulator, and Pick Quality badges (Top Pick, Confident).
faq.a6: 9 independent signals (Glicko-2 ratings, Form L5/L10, Streak, H2H, Market, Last Activity, Odds Role, First Set) vote on every match using 470K+ historical matches. League Portrait tracks which signals are working right now. The pipeline is 100% transparent — you can see every signal on the Match Intelligence page.

howTo.title: How to use Lossbeater
howTo.intro: Lossbeater uses a 9-signal consensus system trained on 470K+ table tennis matches to detect anti-market edges. The system analyzes player form, head-to-head history, Glicko-2 ratings, and market odds across independent signals to generate consensus scores for every match.

howTo.colorsIntro: The left bar on a match row highlights the system's recommendation tier:
howTo.colorGreen: Top Pick (Pro) — Highest-edge pick: 5+ signals agree, validated edge tier confirmed
howTo.colorBlue: Confident / Strong (Pro) — Strong edge: 4+ signals agree, market direction confirmed
howTo.colorRed: FIXA / Upset — High-confidence signal or strong upset detected
howTo.colorAmber: Value Bet (Plus) — Our probability is higher than the bookmaker odds imply
howTo.colorEmerald: LOCK — Edge tier: high-conviction lock pick
howTo.colorOrange: HOT — Edge tier: player on a hot streak with edge
howTo.colorPurple: H2H / ROLE — Edge tier: strong head-to-head or role advantage

empty.runningDetail: Processing thousands of random bet sequences. This takes a moment.
empty.idleDetail: Set your strategy parameters above — win rate, stake size, and number of bets — then click Run Simulation to see bankroll projections, ruin probability, and outcome distribution.

info.title: How to Use the Monte Carlo Simulator
info.subtitle: Answer the question: "If I keep betting like this, will I make money or go broke?"
info.whatBody: It simulates your betting strategy thousands of times into the future. Instead of guessing, you see realistic projections of where your bankroll could end up — best case, worst case, and everything in between.
info.howToFill: How to fill in the parameters
info.startingBankrollDesc: How much money you have right now to bet with (e.g. $1,000).
info.winRateParamDesc: What % of your bets you win. Check your Bet Tracker stats, or use 60-65% as a starting point for table tennis.
info.avgOddsParamDesc: The typical odds you bet at (e.g. 1.50 for favorites, 2.00 for even matchups).
info.stakeParamDesc: How much you bet each time. Flat = fixed amount, Percentage = % of current bankroll, Kelly = mathematically optimal sizing.
info.numBetsParamDesc: How many future bets to project. 500 bets is roughly 1 month of daily betting.
info.simulationsParamDesc: How many times to run the projection. More = more accurate. 1,000 is a good default.
info.medianFinalBankrollDesc: The most likely outcome. If this is higher than your starting bankroll, your strategy is profitable.
info.p10p90Desc: The unlucky (P10) and lucky (P90) outcomes. Shows how volatile your strategy is.
info.probOfRuinDesc: % chance of losing everything. Keep this below 5%. If it's high, reduce your stake size.
info.maxDrawdownDesc: The biggest losing streak dip. Helps you prepare mentally for the bad days.
info.tip: Use the MC button on any active bet to automatically pre-fill the simulator with that bet's odds and stake.

parameters.title: Simulation Parameters
parameters.methodologyFlat: Flat — fixed dollar amount per bet. Simple but stake becomes a smaller fraction as bankroll grows.
parameters.methodologyPercentage: Percentage — fixed % of current bankroll. Grows with wins, shrinks with losses.
parameters.methodologyKelly: Kelly — mathematically optimal fraction based on edge. Maximizes long-run growth but can be volatile.
parameters.methodologyP10P90: P10 / P90 — worst 10% and best 10% outcomes, showing the realistic range of possible results.

aiPredictions.intro: Learn how our 9-signal consensus system analyzes matches and detects anti-market patterns.
aiPredictions.step1Desc: We collect comprehensive data from thousands of table tennis matches, including player statistics, head-to-head records, recent form, and match conditions.
aiPredictions.step2Desc: 9 independent signals are computed per match: Glicko-2 ratings, Form L5/L10, Streak, H2H history, Market direction, Last Activity, Odds Role, and First Set patterns.
aiPredictions.step3Desc: Signals vote on every match. League Portrait tracks which signals are performing right now per league. The Edge Detector surfaces validated HOT, UPSET, LOCK, H2H, and ROLE tier patterns with measured edge.
aiPredictions.step4Desc: Results are displayed as signal consensus scores and edge tiers, along with value bet indicators where market mispricing is detected.
aiPredictions.matchWinnerDesc: Shows the probability (as a percentage) that each player will win the match based on signal consensus. Higher percentage means stronger signal agreement.
aiPredictions.confidenceLevelsDesc: The system assigns edge tiers (HOT, UPSET, LOCK, H2H, ROLE) based on per-league validated patterns with measured +4 to +17pp above market implied probability.
aiPredictions.recentFormDesc: Player win rates across multiple time windows (last 5, 10, 20, 50, 100 matches, last 6 months, all-time). Form L5 and Form L10 are dedicated signals in the 9-signal system.
aiPredictions.h2hDesc: Historical matchups between players reveal dominance patterns. H2H is one of the 9 dedicated signals — activated when a player has 60%+ win rate across 3+ H2H matches.
aiPredictions.temporalDesc: Performance across multiple time windows helps identify trends and form changes. Used by Form L5, Form L10, and Streak signals.
aiPredictions.leagueContextDesc: Different leagues have different patterns. League Portrait adapts to what is working right now in each specific league.
aiPredictions.trackRecordDesc: Our edge tiers show validated +4 to +17pp above market implied probability across different pattern types. Value Bets are flagged when the system detects a meaningful edge over implied odds. Results are measured on live predictions — not backtested data.
aiPredictions.importantNote: No edge detection system wins every bet. Always use our analysis as a tool to inform your decisions, not as the sole basis for betting. Consider multiple factors and never bet more than you can afford to lose.
aiPredictions.linkHowAiWorks: Learn more about How Our Signal System Works →

bankrollManagement.title: Bankroll Management
bankrollManagement.intro: Learn the essential principles of managing your betting bankroll to ensure long-term success and protect your capital.
bankrollManagement.whyMattersDesc: Proper bankroll management is the foundation of successful betting. Even with the best predictions and value bets, poor bankroll management can lead to ruin. Good management protects you from:
bankrollManagement.risk1: Going broke from a few bad losses
bankrollManagement.risk3: Betting more than you can afford
bankrollManagement.principle1Desc: Decide on a fixed amount of money you can afford to lose. This should be separate from your living expenses.
bankrollManagement.principle1Example: If you have $1000 to spare, that becomes your bankroll. Never add more money if you lose.
bankrollManagement.principle2Desc: Bet in units (typically 1-5% of bankroll per bet) rather than fixed dollar amounts.
bankrollManagement.principle2Example: With a $1000 bankroll, 1 unit = $10-$50. Bet 1-2 units on most bets, 3-5 units only on high-confidence plays.
bankrollManagement.principle3Desc: Don't increase bet sizes after losses to "make it back". Stick to your unit system.
bankrollManagement.principle3Example: If you lose 3 bets in a row, don't bet 5 units on the next one. Stay disciplined.
bankrollManagement.principle4Desc: Bet more units on high-confidence plays (value bets, Top Picks) and fewer on speculative bets.
bankrollManagement.principle4Example: Top Pick with high edge: 1.0U stake suggestion. Lower-confidence pick: 0.25U. Use stake suggestions as a guide.
bankrollManagement.kellyDesc: The Kelly Criterion is a mathematical formula that calculates optimal bet sizing based on your edge. Our stake suggestion system and Monte Carlo Simulator both incorporate Kelly math:
bankrollManagement.fullKellyDesc: Maximum growth but high volatility. Recommended for experienced bettors only.
bankrollManagement.halfKellyDesc: Reduces volatility while maintaining good growth. Most popular approach. Our stake suggestions are based on a fractional Kelly approach.
bankrollManagement.quarterKellyDesc: Very conservative. Good for beginners or those with smaller bankrolls.
bankrollManagement.mistake1Desc: Never bet more than 5% of your bankroll on a single match, even if you're "sure" it will win.
bankrollManagement.mistake2Desc: Don't increase bet sizes after losses to try to recover. Stick to your system.
bankrollManagement.mistake3Desc: Only use money you can afford to lose completely.
bankrollManagement.mistake4Desc: Don't bet $10 one day and $100 the next. Use a consistent unit system.
bankrollManagement.recoveryDesc: If you lose a significant portion of your bankroll, here's how to recover:
bankrollManagement.reduceUnitDesc: If your bankroll drops 50%, reduce your unit size proportionally. A $1000 bankroll with $10 units becomes $500 with $5 units.
bankrollManagement.takeBreakDesc: If you're on a losing streak, take a break. Emotional betting leads to more losses.
bankrollManagement.reviewStrategyDesc: Analyze what went wrong. Were you betting on low-value opportunities? Ignoring stake suggestions or Pick Quality tiers?

bettingTerminology.title: Betting Terminology
bettingTerminology.intro: Learn the essential terms and concepts used in sports betting and how they apply to Lossbeater.
bettingTerminology.readyDesc: Now that you understand the terminology, learn how to apply these concepts with our signal-based edge analysis.
bettingTerminology.def_odds: The probability of an outcome expressed as a number. Lower odds indicate a favorite, higher odds indicate an underdog.
bettingTerminology.ex_odds: Odds of 1.50 mean you would win $1.50 for every $1 bet if correct.
bettingTerminology.def_valueBet: A bet where our signal consensus probability is higher than the implied odds probability, giving you a positive edge. Detected by our Edge Detector for Match Winner and Over/Under markets.
bettingTerminology.ex_valueBet: Signal consensus assigns 62% probability, but odds imply 50%. Edge = 12%. That's a value bet for Match Winner.
bettingTerminology.def_edge: The difference between signal consensus probability and the implied odds probability. Positive edge means a statistical advantage over the bookmaker.
bettingTerminology.ex_edge: Model says 60% chance, odds imply 50%. Edge = 10%. Larger edges indicate stronger value bet opportunities.
bettingTerminology.def_pickQuality: A tier system that classifies validated anti-market patterns. HOT: signal consensus in high-edge scenarios. UPSET: underdog-side validated patterns. LOCK: strong favorite confirmation. H2H: historical dominance patterns. ROLE: odds-role based patterns. Each tier has measured +4 to +17pp edge above market.
bettingTerminology.ex_pickQuality: A match where 5+ signals agree and the Edge Detector finds a HOT pattern — this appears with the HOT badge on the match card.
bettingTerminology.def_smartFilters: Filters on the matches page that let you narrow down by edge tier, Value Bet status, market type, or league. Use these to focus on the highest-edge opportunities.
bettingTerminology.ex_smartFilters: Filter by "HOT + Value Bet" to see only matches where both edge signals align — historically the strongest plays.
bettingTerminology.def_temporalWindows: Time-based or count-based analysis periods used to calculate player and H2H statistics. Available windows: last5, last10, last20, last50, last100, last6Months, all_time.
bettingTerminology.ex_temporalWindows: Player A has a 70% win rate in last5 matches but only 55% all_time — recent form is stronger than historical average.
bettingTerminology.def_favorite: The player most likely to win according to the odds. Usually has lower odds (closer to 1.00).
bettingTerminology.ex_favorite: A player with odds of 1.30 is the clear favorite.
bettingTerminology.def_underdog: The player less likely to win. Usually has higher odds. Value bets on underdogs can be particularly profitable when our model disagrees with the market.
bettingTerminology.ex_underdog: A player with odds of 3.50 is the underdog. If our model gives them 40% (vs implied 28%), there's a 12% edge.
bettingTerminology.def_h2h: Historical record of matches between two specific players. Lossbeater provides H2H data across multiple temporal windows, including set-by-set win rates and scoreline distributions.
bettingTerminology.ex_h2h: Player A has won 8 out of 10 matches against Player B (80% win rate) in last10 H2H matches.
bettingTerminology.def_kelly: A mathematical formula to calculate optimal bet sizing based on your edge and bankroll. Our stake suggestions (0.25U–1.0U) use fractional Kelly math to balance growth and risk.
bettingTerminology.ex_kelly: If you have a 5% edge and $1000 bankroll, Kelly suggests betting ~5% of your bankroll. Fractional Kelly reduces this for safety.
bettingTerminology.def_bankroll: The total amount of money you have set aside specifically for betting. Should be managed carefully using unit sizing and never mixed with living expenses.
bettingTerminology.ex_bankroll: If you have $1000 bankroll, using 1-2% per bet = $10-$20 per bet. This protects you from ruin during downswings.
bettingTerminology.def_roi: The percentage of profit or loss relative to your total amount wagered. The true measure of long-term betting profitability.
bettingTerminology.ex_roi: If you bet $1000 total and profit $120, your ROI is +12%. Track this using the Bet Management tool.
bettingTerminology.def_winRate: The percentage of bets that result in a win. Note: a 60% win rate at low odds can be less profitable than a 50% win rate at higher odds. ROI is a better overall metric.
bettingTerminology.ex_winRate: HOT and LOCK edge tiers show validated patterns at +4 to +17pp above market. 900+ matches analyzed daily across 6 leagues.
bettingTerminology.def_ou: A market betting on whether the total points in a match will be over or under a bookmaker line. Lossbeater uses a mixture model (3/4/5 set distributions) to calculate O/U probabilities.
bettingTerminology.ex_ou: Line is 195.5 total points. Our model gives 65% probability for Over based on H2H average of 208 points. Value bet detected.

chatrooms.title: Match Chatrooms
chatrooms.intro: Connect with other table tennis fans in real-time match discussions.
chatrooms.whatAreDesc: Match chatrooms are event-based discussion spaces where you can chat with other fans about specific matches. Each match has its own chatroom that opens when the match is scheduled and closes 5 minutes after the match ends.
chatrooms.step1Desc: Go to any match (scheduled, live, or finished) and open the match analysis page.
chatrooms.step2Desc: Click on the "Event Chatroom" tab in the Community section of the match analysis page.
chatrooms.step3Desc: Type your message in the input field at the bottom and press Enter or click Send. Messages appear in real-time.
chatrooms.activeUsersDesc: See how many users are currently active in the chatroom. Updates in real-time.
chatrooms.editMessagesDesc: You can edit your own messages by clicking the 3-dot menu and selecting "Edit". The message moves to the input field for editing.
chatrooms.deleteMessagesDesc: Delete your own messages using the 3-dot menu. Only you can delete your messages.
chatrooms.autoScrollDesc: The chatroom automatically scrolls to show new messages. Scroll up to view older messages.
chatrooms.emojiDesc: Express yourself with emojis! Our chatroom supports a curated set of emojis perfect for sports and betting discussions:
chatrooms.emojiPickerHint: Click the emoji button in the message input to open the emoji picker.
chatrooms.freeUsersDesc: Free users have a 30-second rate limit between messages to prevent spam and ensure quality discussions.
chatrooms.premiumUsersDesc: Premium users enjoy unlimited chat with no rate limits, allowing for more active participation in discussions.
chatrooms.rule1: Be respectful to other users. No harassment, hate speech, or personal attacks.
chatrooms.rule2: Stay on topic. Discuss the match, players, and predictions.
chatrooms.rule4: Moderators may remove messages that violate these rules.

communityVoting.title: Community Voting System
communityVoting.intro: Understand how community voting works, how rewards are calculated, and how to maximize your earnings.
communityVoting.whatIsDesc: Community voting allows all Lossbeater users to predict match outcomes and compete with each other. When you vote correctly, you earn coins based on the match odds and the total number of votes.
communityVoting.exampleDesc: If 100 people vote on a match and 60 vote for the winner, those 60 people split the reward pool based on the match odds. Higher odds = higher rewards.
communityVoting.rewardCalcDesc: Rewards are calculated based on three factors: match odds, total votes, and your vote share.
communityVoting.rewardFactor3: Your share = votes you contributed / total winning votes
communityVoting.winningDesc: To earn rewards, you must vote correctly on the match outcome before voting closes.
communityVoting.winningCond1: Vote must be placed before match starts
communityVoting.winningCond2: Your prediction must match the final result
communityVoting.winningCond3: Rewards are distributed automatically after match completion
communityVoting.strategy1Desc: Our signal system detects validated anti-market patterns with +4 to +17pp edge above market. Use them as a guide, but always do your own research.
communityVoting.strategy2Desc: Check the voting percentages. Sometimes the community consensus can provide additional insights.
communityVoting.strategy3Desc: Look for matches where the system probability differs significantly from the odds - these often offer better reward potential.
communityVoting.strategy4Desc: Don't put all your coins on one match. Spread your votes across multiple matches to manage risk.
communityVoting.leaderboardDesc: Your voting performance contributes to your leaderboard ranking. The leaderboard tracks:
communityVoting.tipDesc: Consistent accurate voting improves your leaderboard position and demonstrates your betting expertise to the community.
communityVoting.readyDesc: Learn more about the voting system, coin management, and how to maximize your rewards.

cookiePolicy.sec2AnalyticsDesc: Help us understand how users interact with the Service, which features are most used, and where users encounter issues. This data is aggregated and anonymized.
cookiePolicy.sec3Desc: The following third-party services may set cookies:

cookiePolicy.sec7Desc: For questions about our use of cookies, contact us at

howAiWorks.title: How Our Signal System Works
howAiWorks.intro: Deep dive into the technical details of our 9-signal consensus and edge detection system.
howAiWorks.architectureDesc: Our system runs 9 independent signals on every match, built on 470K+ historical table tennis matches. Each signal votes independently — no single model to fool. League Portrait tracks which signals are performing right now per league, and the Edge Detector surfaces validated anti-market patterns.
howAiWorks.coreModelDesc: 9 independent signals vote on every match — agreement amplifies, disagreement dampens
howAiWorks.perLeagueDesc: Intra-day tracking of which signals are working NOW per league
howAiWorks.blendedOutputDesc: Per-league validated patterns with measured +4 to +17pp above market
howAiWorks.ps1: Form L5: win rate differential over last 5 matches (threshold ≥15pp)
howAiWorks.ps2: Form L10: win rate differential over last 10 matches (threshold ≥10pp)
howAiWorks.ps3: Streak: active winning streak of 3+ matches
howAiWorks.ps4: Clean historical data — no reprocessing or future data leakage
howAiWorks.am1: H2H: 60%+ win rate across 3+ head-to-head matches
howAiWorks.am2: First Set: historical 1st set win patterns
howAiWorks.mwDesc: Signal consensus identifies the most likely match winner. The Edge Detector surfaces HOT, UPSET, LOCK, H2H, and ROLE patterns with per-league validated edge above implied market probability.
howAiWorks.fsDesc: Predicts who will win the first set. Uses H2H first-set history with low-spread shrinkage for close matchups. First Set is one of the 9 dedicated signals.
howAiWorks.ouDesc: Predicts whether total points will go over or under the bookmaker's line. Uses a statistical mixture model combining H2H scoring history, player tendency, scoreline distribution, and market signals to calculate calibrated probabilities.
howAiWorks.pickQualityDesc: Not all matches have equal edge. The system classifies validated anti-market patterns into tiers based on signal consensus and per-league measured edge:
howAiWorks.topPickDesc: 5+ signals agree. Per-league validated patterns with +12 to +17pp measured edge above market implied probability.
howAiWorks.confidentPickDesc: 4+ signals agree. Historical dominance or odds-role patterns with +4 to +8pp measured edge above market.
howAiWorks.valueBetDesc: Edge-based detection: our signal consensus probability exceeds the bookmaker's implied probability by a meaningful margin, indicating a mispriced outcome.
howAiWorks.trainingDataDesc: 470K+ matches of clean historical table tennis data. No reprocessing of historical results — signals are computed strictly from data available at match time.
howAiWorks.crossValidationDesc: Edge patterns are validated independently per league. A pattern must show consistent measured edge (not just backtested) before surfacing as an edge tier.
howAiWorks.continuousDesc: League Portrait refreshes intra-day as matches complete. If a signal stops working in a specific league, it stops contributing to edge scores for that league.
howAiWorks.accuracyNote: These statistics represent measured edge on live predictions — not backtested data. Edge may vary by league, time period, and match conditions. Edge tiers are surfaced daily across 6 leagues.

leaderboards.topAccuracyDesc: The highest accuracy rate among all players. See what's possible!

limitations.title: Understanding Limitations
limitations.intro: Learn about the limitations of our signal analysis and how to use it effectively despite these constraints.
limitations.importantDesc: Our signal system detects validated anti-market edges with +4 to +17pp above market implied probability. No edge detection system wins every bet — understanding these limitations helps you use our tools more effectively.
limitations.lim1Desc: Our signal analysis is based on statistical patterns and historical data, but they cannot guarantee outcomes. Sports betting always involves uncertainty.
limitations.lim1Example: Even with a 65% predicted win probability, the underdog still wins 35% of the time. No system beats variance in the short run.
limitations.lim2Desc: Table tennis matches last under 30 minutes. A single lucky set can flip a match, making this sport more volatile than most. Higher variance is expected even for strong favorites.
limitations.lim2Example: A player with a 70% signal probability can easily lose a best-of-5 match in 3 straight sets — short format means small samples.
limitations.lim3Desc: Most leagues use round-robin formats (K4 or K6 groups). Within these groups, rematches between the same players on the same day are common and harder to predict due to the "revenge effect".
limitations.lim3Example: TT Cup uses K4 round-robin. Players meet again in the same session — the player who lost round 1 wins the rematch ~50% of the time.
limitations.lim4Desc: TT Cup (league 29097) historically produces near coin-flip signal consensus due to its K4 round-robin format. We exclude it from Top Pick and Confident Pick tiers to protect edge quality.
limitations.lim4Example: If you see a TT Cup match without a Pick Quality badge, that's intentional — the format makes reliable predictions very difficult.
limitations.lim5Desc: Prediction accuracy depends on data quality. New players or rare matchups may have fewer historical records, reducing prediction reliability.
limitations.lim5Example: A new player with only 5 recorded matches will have a less reliable prediction than a veteran with 200 matches in our database.
limitations.lim6Desc: Bookmaker odds change constantly. The odds we analyze may differ from current odds when you place your bet, affecting value calculations.
limitations.lim6Example: Odds analyzed at match publication may be 2.00, but by the time you bet, they could be 1.75 due to sharp money moving the line.
limitations.eff1Desc: Don't rely solely on signal analysis. Combine it with your own research, player news, and situational analysis.
limitations.eff2Desc: Pay attention to edge tiers (HOT, LOCK, UPSET, H2H, ROLE). Higher-tier patterns represent stronger validated edges above market.
limitations.eff3Desc: Never bet more than you can afford to lose. Use bankroll management principles and the Kelly Calculator to size bets appropriately.
limitations.eff4Desc: Focus on long-term edge performance, not individual match results. Validated patterns still lose individual bets — that's expected variance, not a broken system.
limitations.accuracyContextDesc: Our edge is measured across 900+ matches per day across 6 active leagues. Here's what the numbers mean in practice:
limitations.ac1: Overall (all matches): edge varies by market and league conditions
limitations.ac2: Confident Pick tier: validated anti-market pattern, per-league confirmed
limitations.ac3: Top Pick tier: 5+ signals agree — highest-conviction edge patterns
limitations.ac4: TT Cup: excluded from edge tiers due to K4 round-robin format
limitations.ac5: Edge varies by league — Setka Cup and Czech Liga perform best
limitations.ac6: Short-term results can deviate significantly from long-term edge averages
limitations.realisticDesc: If you stick to HOT/LOCK edge tiers, you benefit from a systematic +12 to +17pp advantage above market — but you will have a curated selection of matches each day. Quality over quantity.
limitations.workingOnDesc: We're continuously improving our edge detection system. Current focus areas include:
limitations.wo1: Expanding data sources and historical coverage
limitations.wo2: Discovering new validated anti-market patterns per league
limitations.wo3: Adding more markets and edge detection options
limitations.wo4: Real-time odds tracking and value bet alerts
limitations.wo5: Better League Portrait resolution for rare matchups
limitations.learnMoreDesc: Understanding limitations helps you use our tools more effectively. Learn about edge accuracy and responsible betting.

matchAnalysis.h2h2: Face-to-face table: W-L, first set rates, total points
matchAnalysis.playerFormDesc: See each player's recent form visualization alongside an AI-written narrative analysis that summarizes the key factors behind the prediction.
matchAnalysis.pf2: AI-generated narrative (Claude): strengths, weaknesses, key risks
matchAnalysis.communityDesc: Vote on the match outcome, see how the community is leaning, and discuss with other fans in real-time. Earn coins for correct votes.
matchAnalysis.probPercDesc: Each prediction shows a percentage (e.g., "65% Home, 35% Away"). Higher percentages indicate higher confidence, but remember:
matchAnalysis.prob1: 60-70%: Moderate confidence - the favorite is likely but not guaranteed
matchAnalysis.prob2: 70-80%: High confidence - strong favorite but upsets still happen
matchAnalysis.prob3: 80%+: Very high confidence - but still not 100% certain
matchAnalysis.prob4: 50-60%: Low confidence - close match, either outcome is plausible
matchAnalysis.pickQualityDesc: We assign edge tiers based on signal consensus and validated anti-market patterns:
matchAnalysis.topPickDesc: 5+ signals agree with market direction, HOT/LOCK pattern confirmed. Our highest-conviction validated edge selections.
matchAnalysis.confidentPickDesc: 4+ signals agree, market agreement, and consensus confirms the pattern.
matchAnalysis.standardDesc: Does not meet Top or Confident thresholds. Still useful as a signal.
matchAnalysis.use1Desc: Review the three signal cards (MW, First Set, O/U). Check the Decision Summary for a plain-language explanation of how the signal system reached its consensus.
matchAnalysis.use2Desc: Look for dominance patterns. A player with 80%+ H2H win rate has a strong historical advantage.
matchAnalysis.use3Desc: Check how each player has performed in their last 5-10 matches. Hot streaks matter.
matchAnalysis.use4Desc: If a match is marked as a "Value Bet", our signal system has detected an edge — the odds may undervalue the true probability.
matchAnalysis.use5Desc: See how other users are voting. Sometimes the crowd is right, but don't follow blindly - use it as one data point.

predictionAccuracy.title: Understanding Edge Accuracy
predictionAccuracy.intro: Learn about our signal methodology, the challenges we face, and how we detect validated anti-market edges across our main markets.
predictionAccuracy.challengeDesc: Table tennis is one of the most active sports in terms of match volume. On any given day, we analyze matches across dozens of leagues, with hundreds of players competing in multiple tournaments simultaneously.
predictionAccuracy.multipleLeaguesDesc: We track matches from Czech Liga Pro, Setka Cup, TT Cup, TT Elite Series, Challenger Series, and many more.
predictionAccuracy.highVolumeDesc: Players often compete in multiple matches per day, sometimes across different leagues and tournaments.
predictionAccuracy.threeMarketsDesc: We analyze Match Winner (1x2), First Set, and Over/Under — each with dedicated signal calibration.
predictionAccuracy.lgbmDesc: Our system runs 9 independent signals on every match, built on 470K+ historical matches with clean historical data:
predictionAccuracy.lgbm1Desc: 9 independent signals (Glicko-2, Form L5/L10, Streak, H2H, Market, Last Activity, Odds Role, First Set) vote on each match
predictionAccuracy.lgbm2Desc: Intra-day tracking of which signals are working right now per league — stops signals that aren't contributing
predictionAccuracy.lgbm3Desc: Signals are computed strictly from data available at match time — no reprocessing or future data leakage
predictionAccuracy.fsCalibDesc: First Set predictions use H2H-first statistical blending calibrated by sample size:
predictionAccuracy.fsCalib1: H2H-first blend: 80% H2H / 20% empirical when 12+ H2H samples available
predictionAccuracy.fsCalib2: Low-spread shrinkage toward 50% for close matchups to reduce noise
predictionAccuracy.fsCalib3: Requires minimum 3 H2H matches to generate reliable First Set probabilities
predictionAccuracy.ouBayesDesc: For Over/Under predictions, we use a statistical mixture model that combines signals from H2H history and match context:
predictionAccuracy.ouBayes1Desc: H2H scoring history, average points, MW spread, player tendency, scoreline distribution, and line-level correction
predictionAccuracy.ouBayes2Desc: Predictions are shrunk toward neutral to reduce overconfidence in small-sample matchups
predictionAccuracy.ouBayes3: Value Bets on Over/Under achieve strong accuracy when a meaningful edge is detected
predictionAccuracy.mwDesc: Analyzes which player will win the overall match. 9 signals including H2H records, temporal win rates, Glicko-2 ratings, and bookmaker odds vote on the outcome. HOT and LOCK edge tiers represent the strongest validated patterns.
predictionAccuracy.fsDesc: Predicts who will win the first set. Anchored to the Match Winner signal with H2H-based statistical calibration.
predictionAccuracy.ouDesc: Predicts whether the total points played will be over or under the bookmaker's line. Uses a statistical mixture model calibrated on H2H scoring history. Value Bets are flagged when a meaningful edge over the bookmaker is detected.
predictionAccuracy.underdogTitle: The Underdog Factor: Why Better Players Sometimes Lose
predictionAccuracy.underdogDesc: One of the most challenging aspects of table tennis predictions is that underdogs frequently win, even when they appear to be the weaker player on paper. This happens for several reasons:
predictionAccuracy.ud1Desc: A lower-ranked player who is in excellent form can defeat a higher-ranked player who is struggling. Our Form L5 and Form L10 signals track recent performance more heavily than overall ranking.
predictionAccuracy.ud2Desc: Tournament importance, fatigue from previous matches, and motivation levels can significantly impact outcomes. A player fighting to avoid relegation may perform better than a player who has already secured their position.
predictionAccuracy.ud3Desc: Some players have styles that are particularly effective against certain opponents, regardless of overall ranking. Our H2H analysis helps identify these patterns, but they're not always obvious from surface-level statistics.
predictionAccuracy.ud4Desc: Table tennis matches can be decided by small margins. A few key points can swing an entire match, especially in best-of-5 or best-of-7 formats. This inherent variance means upsets are more common than in sports with longer formats.
predictionAccuracy.ud5Desc: While our 9 signals cover key dimensions, some factors are difficult to quantify: player injuries, personal circumstances, equipment changes, or tactical adjustments. These can significantly impact performance but aren't always visible in the data.
predictionAccuracy.currentNumbersDesc: These numbers reflect our live prediction performance — measured on real matches, not backtested data:
predictionAccuracy.overall: Overall accuracy across all matches and markets
predictionAccuracy.topConfident: HOT/LOCK edge tier performance — our highest-conviction validated patterns
predictionAccuracy.ic1: Edge varies by market type (Match Winner, First Set, Over/Under)
predictionAccuracy.ic2: HOT and LOCK tiers (+12 to +17pp) outperform the overall baseline significantly
predictionAccuracy.ic3: Value Bets are detected when our signal consensus has a meaningful edge over implied odds
predictionAccuracy.ic4: Some leagues (e.g. TT Cup) are structurally harder to predict due to format
predictionAccuracy.ic5: We're transparent about our limitations and always show confidence levels
predictionAccuracy.whatWeAnalyzeDesc: For each match, we collect and analyze comprehensive data:
predictionAccuracy.wa1: Head-to-head records (last5, last10, last20, last50, last100, last6Months, all-time)
predictionAccuracy.wa2: Temporal win rates across the same windows
predictionAccuracy.wa3: Performance by league and tournament type
predictionAccuracy.wa4: Bookmaker odds (used as a feature in the core model)
predictionAccuracy.wa5: Set-by-set win rates (S1–S5) from H2H history
predictionAccuracy.wa6: Total points average, min, max, median from H2H
predictionAccuracy.inherentLimDesc: Despite our comprehensive analysis, some factors are beyond our control:
predictionAccuracy.il4: Tactical surprises or unexpected strategy changes
predictionAccuracy.htu1Desc: Pay attention to our edge tier indicators (HOT, LOCK, UPSET, H2H, ROLE). Higher-tier patterns generally represent stronger validated edges.
predictionAccuracy.htu2Desc: Don't rely solely on Match Winner. Check Handicap, Over/Under, and First Game predictions for a more complete picture.
predictionAccuracy.htu3Desc: Review H2H records, recent form, and match importance. Our predictions are data-driven, but context matters.
predictionAccuracy.htu4Desc: Upsets happen in table tennis more often than in other sports. Even validated HOT/LOCK patterns will not win every bet. Use proper bankroll management.
predictionAccuracy.htu5Desc: Use our Value Bets filter to find matches where our signal consensus suggests the odds undervalue the true probability.
predictionAccuracy.continuousDesc: We're constantly working to improve our edge detection:
predictionAccuracy.ci1: League Portrait refreshes intra-day as signal performance evolves
predictionAccuracy.ci2: Refining signal thresholds based on per-league measured edge
predictionAccuracy.ci3: Improving data collection and historical data quality
predictionAccuracy.ci4: Validating new anti-market patterns before surfacing as edge tiers
predictionAccuracy.ci5: Learning from edge detection misses to identify new patterns

premiumFeatures.title: Premium Features
premiumFeatures.intro: Unlock advanced tools and exclusive features to maximize your analytical edge with Lossbeater Premium.
premiumFeatures.whatsIncludedDesc: Premium membership gives you access to powerful tools and features designed to help you make smarter, more profitable betting decisions.
premiumFeatures.feat1Desc: Edge-based value bet detection powered by our signal consensus. Compares signal probability vs implied odds probability and surfaces bets where you have a meaningful statistical edge.
premiumFeatures.feat1Example: Signal consensus assigns 65% probability to Player A winning, but odds imply only 50% — a 15% edge flagged as a Value Bet.
premiumFeatures.feat2Desc: Build multi-match parlays with correlated risk analysis. See combined odds, estimated probability, and how each leg affects your overall risk profile.
premiumFeatures.feat2Example: Combine 3 high-confidence picks into a parlay. See the combined probability before placing the bet.
premiumFeatures.feat3Desc: Simulate thousands of betting scenarios to project your bankroll growth over time. Set your win rate, odds, and number of bets to see realistic best/median/worst-case outcomes.
premiumFeatures.feat3Example: Run 10,000 simulations with 60% win rate at 1.80 odds over 200 bets. See your bankroll trajectory and risk of ruin.
premiumFeatures.feat4Desc: Track all your bets in one place. Log outcomes, monitor your ROI over time, and identify which markets and leagues are most profitable for you.
premiumFeatures.feat4Example: Log a bet on Player A at 1.90 odds, 1U stake. Later mark it as won. Your running P&L updates automatically.
premiumFeatures.feat5Desc: Compare up to 4 players side by side across all metrics — win rates, form, H2H records, set win rates, and more. Identify matchup edges before they appear in the odds.
premiumFeatures.feat5Example: Compare Player A vs Player B across last 20 matches, first set win rate, and head-to-head record to find a hidden edge.
premiumFeatures.feat6Desc: Automatic bet sizing suggestions (0.25U–1.0U) shown on each match card. Calculated from edge and signal consensus strength using Kelly Criterion math.
premiumFeatures.feat6Example: A HOT/LOCK pick with 5% edge shows a 1.0U stake suggestion. A lower-edge signal shows 0.25U.
premiumFeatures.feat7Desc: Exclusive access to our private Telegram group for subscribers. Receive daily picks, value bet alerts, and engage in real-time discussion with the Pro community. A free public channel (@LossbeaterPicks) is also available for everyone.
premiumFeatures.feat7Example: Get notified the moment a HOT/LOCK edge tier or Value Bet is detected — before the odds move.
premiumFeatures.provenAccDesc: HOT and LOCK edge tiers show +12 to +17pp above market implied probability. Value Bets are flagged when our signal consensus detects a meaningful edge over implied odds. Analyzed across 900+ matches daily.
premiumFeatures.maxEdgeDesc: Value bets and stake suggestions help you identify opportunities and size your bets optimally for long-term profitability.
premiumFeatures.saveTimeDesc: Get instant value bet alerts and use simulation tools instead of manually analyzing hundreds of matches every day.
premiumFeatures.betaDesc: Both Plus and Pro plans include a 3-day free trial — no credit card required. Join now to get full access to all premium tools immediately.
premiumFeatures.readyDesc: Learn more about premium access, or explore feature comparisons.

responsibleBetting.title: Responsible Betting
responsibleBetting.intro: Learn how to bet responsibly, manage your bankroll, and recognize when to seek help.
responsibleBetting.disclaimerDesc: Lossbeater provides statistical analysis and signal-based edge detection for informational purposes only. We are not a bookmaker. All betting is done through external bookmakers and is entirely your own decision. Betting involves risk of loss. You must be 18+ to use this service. Users are solely responsible for their decisions.
responsibleBetting.p1Desc: Only bet with money you can afford to lose. Set a monthly budget and never exceed it, regardless of wins or losses.
responsibleBetting.p1Example: If you earn $3000/month, allocate no more than $100-200 for betting. Never use rent, bills, or emergency funds.
responsibleBetting.p2Desc: Losing streaks happen to everyone. Never increase your bet sizes to recover losses - this leads to bigger problems.
responsibleBetting.p2Example: If you lose 3 bets in a row, take a break. Don't bet $100 on the next match to "win back" your $30 loss.
responsibleBetting.p3Desc: Betting should be entertainment, not a full-time activity. Set daily time limits and stick to them.
responsibleBetting.p3Example: Limit yourself to 1-2 hours per day for research and betting. Use our tools efficiently to save time.
responsibleBetting.p4Desc: Step away from betting regularly. Take breaks after losses, wins, or when you feel emotional about outcomes.
responsibleBetting.p4Example: After a big win or loss, take 24-48 hours off. Clear your mind before making new decisions.
responsibleBetting.p5Desc: Never place bets when emotional, intoxicated, or under stress. Make decisions with a clear, rational mind.
responsibleBetting.p5Example: If you're angry about a loss, excited about a win, or had a few drinks - wait until tomorrow to bet.
responsibleBetting.p6Desc: If betting is affecting your life, relationships, or finances, seek professional help immediately.
responsibleBetting.p6Example: Contact organizations like Gamblers Anonymous or speak with a counselor if you feel you're losing control.
responsibleBetting.warningDesc: If you recognize any of these signs, it may be time to take a break or seek help:
responsibleBetting.w1: Betting more than you can afford to lose
responsibleBetting.w2: Lying to friends or family about betting
responsibleBetting.w3: Feeling anxious or stressed about betting
responsibleBetting.w7: Feeling unable to stop or control betting
responsibleBetting.w8: Betting to escape problems or relieve stress
responsibleBetting.selfExclusionDesc: Most bookmakers offer self-exclusion tools that allow you to:
responsibleBetting.usingResponsiblyDesc: Lossbeater is designed to help you make informed decisions, not to encourage excessive betting. Here's how to use our platform responsibly:
responsibleBetting.ur1Desc: Our signal analysis is a tool to inform your decisions, not a guarantee. Always do your own research and never bet more than you can afford.
responsibleBetting.ur2Desc: Use our bankroll management tools and stake suggestions to size bets appropriately. Never risk more than 5-10% of your bankroll on a single bet.
responsibleBetting.ur3Desc: Use our tools efficiently. Don't spend hours analyzing every match - focus on quality over quantity.
responsibleBetting.rememberDesc: Betting should be fun and entertaining. If it stops being fun, take a break. Your well-being is more important than any bet.

setupProfile.title: Set Up Your Profile

setupProfile.step2Desc: Go to the "Personal Information" tab to update your profile photo, username, and account info. Changes are saved immediately.
setupProfile.step3Desc: Open the "Regional Settings" section to choose your preferred language and timezone. This controls how match times and dates are displayed.
setupProfile.step4Desc: Adjust notification settings in the "Notifications" section to stay updated on match results, community activity, and important updates.
setupProfile.photoDesc: Upload a profile photo that appears next to your username in the community, chatrooms, and leaderboards.
setupProfile.usernameDesc: Your username is how other users will see you in the community. Choose something recognizable — it appears on leaderboards and in chatrooms.
setupProfile.accountInfoDesc: View your account details managed via Clerk. Email address and social login connections are managed here.
setupProfile.privacyDesc: Control your privacy settings, including what others can see on your public profile.
setupProfile.notificationsDesc: Choose which notifications you receive: match results, community activity, vote outcomes, and platform updates.
setupProfile.regionalDesc: Set your timezone and language. Match times across the platform will display in your local timezone.
setupProfile.personalInfoTabDesc: Your main settings hub. Contains six focused sections: Profile Photo, Username, Account Info, Privacy & Security, Notifications, and Regional Settings.
setupProfile.favoritePlayersTabDesc: A card grid of your followed players — similar to the Leagues page layout. Shows each player's recent form, activity stats, and lets you manage your favorites.

setupProfile.communityTabDesc: See your recent votes, friends list, and community activity. Build your network and track who you follow.

smartFilters.title: Smart Filters
smartFilters.intro: Use our intelligent filters to quickly find matches that match your betting strategy and preferences.
smartFilters.filter1Desc: Switch between the three main prediction markets. Selecting "1x2" shows Match Winner data, "1st Set" shows First Set win rates, and "Over/Under" shows H2H average points vs. the line.
smartFilters.filter1UseCase: Focus on the market you want to bet — each view shows market-specific columns.
smartFilters.filter2Desc: Show only matches where the signal system has assigned a "Top Pick" tier — 5+ signals agree with market direction. These are our highest-conviction edge selections with validated HOT/LOCK patterns.
smartFilters.filter2UseCase: Focus on the strongest edge patterns to maximize signal quality.
smartFilters.filter3Desc: Show only matches tagged as "Confident Pick" — 4+ signals agree, market agreement, and consensus confirmed. These represent the next tier of validated patterns.
smartFilters.filter3UseCase: Slightly larger selection than Top Picks, still strong validated edge.
smartFilters.filter4Desc: Show only matches where the signal system detects a positive edge — our consensus probability exceeds the bookmaker's implied probability by a meaningful margin.
smartFilters.filter4UseCase: Focus on the most profitable betting opportunities regardless of confidence tier.
smartFilters.filter5Desc: Filter matches by specific league (Setka Cup, TT Elite Series, Czech Liga Pro, TT Cup, Setka Women, Challenger Series, etc.).
smartFilters.filter5UseCase: Focus on leagues you track or where your bankroll strategy applies.
smartFilters.step1Desc: Click one of the market pills at the top of the matches list: "1x2" (Match Winner), "1st Set", or "Over/Under". The columns in each match card will update to show market-specific data.
smartFilters.step2Title: Apply Pick Quality or Value Bet Filters
smartFilters.step2Desc: Use the filter checkboxes to narrow to Top Picks, Confident Picks, or Value Bets. You can combine these for a tighter selection.
smartFilters.step3Desc: Use the league dropdown to narrow results to specific competitions. Matches are grouped by league by default.
smartFilters.step4Desc: Click "Clear All" to reset all active filters and see the full match list again.
smartFilters.combo1Desc: Select "1x2" market + "Top Pick" filter. You will see only Match Winner picks where 5+ signals agree with market direction — our strongest validated edge patterns.
smartFilters.combo2Desc: Use the "Value Bets" filter on the "Over/Under" market to find O/U edges. Value Bet O/U picks are flagged when a meaningful signal edge vs implied odds is detected.
smartFilters.combo3Desc: Enable "Confident Pick" filter across any market. Curated selection requiring 4+ signals and consensus agreement — strong validated edge.
smartFilters.combo4Desc: Filter by a high-accuracy league (e.g., TT Elite or Setka Cup) and combine with "Top Pick" for the best signal-to-noise ratio in that competition.

usingPredictions.title: How to Use Predictions
usingPredictions.intro: Learn how to effectively use signal analysis across three markets — Match Winner (1x2), First Set, and Over/Under — to make smarter betting decisions.
usingPredictions.bestPracticesDesc: Our signal analysis is a powerful tool, but it works best when combined with your own analysis and sound betting principles. Here's how to use it effectively:
usingPredictions.strat1Desc: Don't rely solely on signal analysis. Combine it with player news, recent form, head-to-head records, and situational factors.
usingPredictions.strat1Example: Signal consensus shows 65% win probability, but player just returned from injury. Check recent matches and H2H before betting.
usingPredictions.strat2Desc: Look for matches where the signal consensus probability significantly differs from bookmaker odds. These value bets offer better long-term returns.
usingPredictions.strat2Example: Signal: 60% win probability. Odds: 2.00 (50% implied). This 10% edge is a value bet worth considering.
usingPredictions.strat3Desc: We surface HOT, UPSET, LOCK, H2H, and ROLE edge tiers based on per-league validated anti-market patterns. These are curated daily patterns — prioritize them over untiered matches.
usingPredictions.strat3Example: A match tagged "HOT" has 5+ signals agreeing with market direction — that combination represents our strongest validated edge pattern.
usingPredictions.strat4Desc: Check the stake suggestion shown on each match card to size bets based on signal consensus strength. Never bet more than 5-10% of your bankroll.
usingPredictions.strat4Example: A match with strong consensus shows a 1.0U stake suggestion. A lower-edge signal shows 0.25U. Adjust to your bankroll.
usingPredictions.strat5Desc: Validated edge tiers show consistent measured edge above market, but every system has losing runs. Focus on long-term profitability, not individual results.
usingPredictions.strat5Example: If you follow 10 HOT/LOCK patterns, the measured edge gives you a systematic advantage over time — individual variance is normal.
usingPredictions.strat6Desc: Keep a record of which predictions you followed and their outcomes. This helps you identify patterns and improve your decision-making.
usingPredictions.strat6Example: Track wins/losses, bet sizes, and ROI. Review monthly to identify what's working and what needs adjustment.
usingPredictions.step1Desc: Check the match analysis page for signal consensus scores, edge tiers, and probability percentages.
usingPredictions.step2Desc: Review player statistics, head-to-head records, recent form, and any relevant news or updates.
usingPredictions.step3Desc: Compare system probabilities with bookmaker odds. Look for significant differences that indicate value bets.
usingPredictions.step4Desc: Check the stake suggestion shown on each match card to size your bet based on edge and signal consensus strength.
usingPredictions.step5Desc: Place your bet with a bookmaker, ensuring you're betting within your bankroll limits.
usingPredictions.step6Desc: Record the outcome and review your results periodically to identify patterns and improve.
usingPredictions.mistake1Desc: Never bet solely based on signal analysis without doing your own research. Always verify and consider additional factors.
usingPredictions.mistake2Desc: Don't bet more than you can afford to lose. Stick to 5-10% of your bankroll per bet, regardless of confidence level.
usingPredictions.mistake3Desc: If a prediction is wrong, don't increase your next bet to recover. Stick to your bankroll management plan.
usingPredictions.mistake4Desc: Quality over quantity. Focus on matches with clear value and high confidence, not every available match.
usingPredictions.threeMarketsDesc: Predictions are available for Match Winner (1x2), First Set winner, and Over/Under total points. Each market has its own probability and recommendation.
usingPredictions.threeMarketsExample: A match can show Player A as the Match Winner favorite while the First Set market favors Player B — each market is modeled independently.
usingPredictions.pickQualityDesc: Matches are labeled "Top Pick" or "Confident Pick" when 5+ or 4+ signals agree with validated edge tiers confirmed.
usingPredictions.pickQualityExample: "Top Pick" requires 5+ signals agreeing with market direction and a validated HOT/LOCK pattern. Most matches will not qualify — that selectivity surfaces the strongest patterns.
usingPredictions.valueBetsDesc: Value Bets are flagged when the signal consensus probability significantly exceeds the bookmaker's implied probability — indicating the odds are mispriced in your favor.
usingPredictions.valueBetsExample: Signal consensus assigns 62% win probability. Bookmaker odds imply 50%. That 12% edge makes this a Value Bet worth considering.
usingPredictions.overallAccDesc: HOT and LOCK tiers show +12 to +17pp measured edge above market. Edge varies by league and market type.
usingPredictions.overallAccExample: Filtering to HOT/LOCK patterns surfaces the strongest anti-market edges at the cost of fewer bets per day. 900+ matches are analyzed daily across 6 leagues.
usingPredictions.readyDesc: Now that you understand how to use predictions effectively, explore our tools and start making smarter betting decisions.

valueBets.title: Value Bets Explained
valueBets.intro: Learn how to identify and capitalize on value betting opportunities using our signal-based edge detection.
valueBets.whatIsDesc: A value bet occurs when the probability of an outcome is higher than what the odds suggest. In other words, the bookmaker has undervalued the true probability of an event occurring.
valueBets.formulaText: Edge = Signal Probability − Implied Odds Probability
valueBets.formulaNote: If the edge is positive, you have found a value bet. The larger the edge, the stronger the opportunity.
valueBets.exampleDesc: Our signal system assigns a 62% probability to Player A winning. The bookmaker's odds of 2.00 imply only 50%. That's a 12% edge — flagged as a Value Bet.
valueBets.aiProbDesc: Our 9-signal system calculates the true probability of each outcome — match winner and over/under — using player stats, head-to-head data, form, and market signals.
valueBets.impliedOddsDesc: The bookmaker odds are converted to an implied probability. Our Edge Detector then compares signal probability vs implied probability to detect discrepancies.
valueBets.edgeCalcDesc: Edge = (Signal Probability) − (Implied Odds Probability). Only bets exceeding a minimum edge threshold are surfaced as value bets to filter out noise.
valueBets.valueBadgeDesc: Matches with significant positive edge on Match Winner or Over/Under markets are marked with our "Value Bet" indicator on match cards and in the Value Bets Scanner.
valueBets.mwDesc: Value bets on the match winner market. Our system compares signal consensus probability against the implied probability from home/away odds.
valueBets.ouDesc: Value bets on total points lines. Probability is calculated from a mixture model using H2H total points distributions and compared against the bookmaker line.
valueBets.exclusionsDesc: Leagues with structurally unpredictable formats are excluded from value bet detection. Currently this includes TT Cup (league 29097), which uses a K4 round-robin format where first-round opponents are often unfamiliar with each other, producing near coin-flip signal consensus.
valueBets.exclusionsNote: Excluding these leagues keeps value bet signals focused on matches where the model has a genuine edge.
valueBets.stakeDesc: Each match shows automatic stake suggestions (0.25U–1.0U) based on edge and signal consensus strength, calculated using Kelly Criterion math.
valueBets.highEdgeDesc: Prioritize matches with larger edges for better long-term profitability. Combine value bet signals with edge tiers (HOT, LOCK) for the strongest opportunities.
valueBets.trackDesc: Use Bet Management to log your value bet plays and track ROI over time. Value betting is a long-term strategy — results over hundreds of bets matter more than any single outcome.
valueBets.cons1: Value bets increase your long-term edge, but individual bets can still lose
valueBets.cons2: Always use proper bankroll management — stake suggestions are a guide, not a rule
valueBets.cons3: Consider other factors beyond just edge (player form, match context, etc.)
valueBets.cons4: Value betting is a long-term strategy — judge performance over hundreds of bets

votingSystem.title: Voting System
votingSystem.intro: Learn how to vote on match outcomes, earn coins, and compete with the community.
votingSystem.howVotingDesc: The voting system allows you to predict match outcomes and earn coins when you're correct. Each vote costs 10 coins, and you can vote on either the Home or Away player.
votingSystem.step1Desc: Navigate to any match analysis page (scheduled, live, or finished matches).
votingSystem.step2Desc: Check signal analysis, player statistics, and head-to-head records to make an informed decision.
votingSystem.step3Desc: Click on "Home" or "Away" to vote. The vote costs 10 coins and is locked 1 minute before match start.
votingSystem.step4Desc: If your prediction is correct, you'll earn coins based on the match odds and your subscription tier.
votingSystem.winningVotesDesc: When you correctly predict a match outcome, you earn coins based on the match odds. Higher odds mean higher rewards!
votingSystem.dailyRewardsDesc: Claim daily coin rewards to keep voting. Premium users get higher daily rewards and multipliers.
votingSystem.communityStatsDesc: See how the community is voting on each match. The progress bar shows the percentage of votes for each player, helping you understand community sentiment.
votingSystem.tip1Desc: Our signal system analyzes thousands of matches. Consider the edge signals when voting.
votingSystem.tip2Desc: Historical matchups between players can reveal patterns and dominance.
votingSystem.tip3Desc: Player performance in recent matches is often a strong indicator of future results.
